passiveAbilities.name: Granite Fists
passiveAbilities.description:
If this character deals Impact Melee
Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Calcify
passiveAbilities.description: Models engaged by this character during the Replenish Step generate -1 energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Stone Song
arcaneAbilities.description:
This ability is not modified by Cover
Decrease target Moonstone's depth value by X, to a minimum of 1.
Catastrophe: The resisting player sets the depth value of the target Moonstone to a number of their choice.

signatureMove.name: Crushing Embrace
signatureMove.passiveEffect: This attack deals W damage against models which are further than 1” away.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, they must discard half their energy, rounding up.
